sentences.arabic: كَانَ الصَّوْتُ الدَّاخِلِيُّ لِيَزِيدَ يَقُولُ «أَنْتَ لَسْتَ جَيِّدًا».
sentences.translation: Unutarnji glas Jazida mu je govorio "nisi dobar".
sentences.translationEn: Yazid's inner voice used to say "you are not good enough".

sentences.arabic: أَدْرَكَ أَنَّ هَذَا الصَّوْتَ لَيْسَ صَحِيحًا.
sentences.translation: Shvatio je da taj glas nije istinit.
sentences.translationEn: He realised that this voice was not true.

sentences.translation: Promijenio je riječi i rekao "ja učim i napredujem".
sentences.translationEn: He changed the words and said "I am learning and improving".

sentences.arabic: الطَّرِيقَةُ الَّتِي نُكَلِّمُ بِهَا أَنْفُسَنَا تُؤَثِّرُ عَلَيْنَا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Način na koji razgovaramo sami sa sobom jako na nas utiče.
sentences.translationEn: The way we talk to ourselves affects us a great deal.
